nasb.text: Samson then said to them, “This time I shall be blameless in regard to the Philistines when I do them harm.”

esv.text: And Samson said to them, “This time I shall be innocent in regard to the Philistines, when I do them harm.”

cnv.text: 參孫對他們說：“這次如果我加害非利士人，就可以不必負責了。”

ccb.text: 参孙说：“这次我要加害非利士人，可不能怪我了。”
